narrative:
Claridon Twp township has 2,179 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
